title: Conversation doesn't autoscroll to bottom
description: at the start when the page loads, as well as when the user sends a prompt, the conversation doesn't scroll to it
selector: chat-message:nth-child(6) > div.flex.justify-start > div.max-w-[80%].space-y-4:nth-child(2) > div.bg-card.border > div.text-sm.leading-relaxed > p:nth-child(1)
cssSelector: chat-message:nth-child(6) > div.flex.justify-start > div.max-w-[80%].space-y-4:nth-child(2) > div.bg-card.border > div.text-sm.leading-relaxed > p:nth-child(1)
author: Gernot Raudner
annotatedElementText: When you have resistance to a damage type, you subtract the resistance value from the total damage dealt after applying any weaknesses or immunities.
